info.name: Cortex Search REST API
info.description:
OpenAPI 3.0 specification for the Cortex Search REST API

Contact Support:
 Name: Snowflake, Inc.
 Email: support@snowflake.com

response.name: successful
response.body:
{
  "name": "<string>",

  "indexing_state": "ACTIVE",
  "serving_state": "ACTIVE",
  "indexing_error": "<string>",
  "serving_data_bytes": "<long>"
}

request.description: Delete a cortex search service with the given name. If ifExists is used, the operation will succeed even if the object does not exist. Otherwise, there will be a failure if the drop is unsuccessful.
Query a Cortex Search Service to get search results.

query.description: Query parameter that identifies the target to which suspension or resumption of the cortex search service should be applied.

request.description: Suspends one or both of the indexing or serving targets of a cortex search service.
